summary: Completed comprehensive testing of API Keys admin panel fixes. Backend API endpoints working correctly with Twitter/GitHub removed, proxy binding supported, and CoinGecko rotation configured. Frontend admin interface exists but API Keys tab navigation had issues during testing.

minor_issues.issue: Proxy management endpoint not found at expected path

ui_bugs.issue: Tab navigation did not properly switch to API Keys interface during testing

passed_tests: Twitter and GitHub successfully removed from services list
Services list contains expected services (CoinGecko, CoinMarketCap, Messari, OpenAI)
API keys can be bound to specific proxy via proxy_id parameter
Service validation correctly rejects invalid services
Service validation requires non-empty service selection
CoinGecko proxy rotation system can be configured with multiple keys
Proxy priorities are correctly different (Priority 1 and Priority 2, not both 1)
API keys list endpoint responds correctly
API key creation with proxy binding works

recommendations: Verify API Keys tab navigation in frontend works correctly
Consider adding data-testid attributes to API Keys interface components for better testing
The default service dropdown behavior needs verification (should be empty, not CoinGecko)
action_item_for_main_agent.status: Most fixes implemented correctly - primarily frontend tab navigation needs verification
